# Automated EDA Dashboard Requirement

## User

Data Analyst

## Problem

Analysts spend time repeatedly performing basic exploratory data analysis on every new CSV dataset.

## Input

A CSV file containing tabular data with headers.

## Expected Outputs

* Dataset shape
* Column list
* Data types
* Missing value summary
* Numeric summary
* Interactive charts
* Top and bottom records by Sales
* Automatically generated insights

## Success Criteria

The application accepts a CSV file and automatically generates useful EDA results without requiring the user to write Python code.
